nasb.text: The axe is already laid at the root of the trees; therefore every tree that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire.

esv.text: Even now the axe is laid to the root of the trees. Every tree therefore that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire.

cnv.text: 現在斧頭已經放在樹根上，所有不結好果子的樹，就砍下來，丟在火裡。

ccb.text: 现在斧头已经放在树根上了，不结好果子的树都要被砍下，丢在火里。

csbs.text: 现在斧子已经放在树根上，所有不结好果子的树都要被砍下来，被丢进火里。
